source.note: Sample fixture matching the v1 schema so Codex Track A runtime integration (matching.js:scorePair bonus signal) can develop and test in parallel with a real ESCI generator. Real generator requires parquet parsing of the 700 MB Amazon dataset and is deferred as a follow-up. Fixture pairs are illustrative ASINs (fictional; not real Amazon products) that exercise: (1) a normal high-count substitute pair, (2) a low-count pair (queryCount: 1), (3) a pair where a and b were swapped in the source before canonicalization.
